description: This file defines the `AuditLog` entity class for a Java Spring Boot application, representing audit trail records with fields such as action, email, source IP, timestamp, and metadata. It is annotated with JPA annotations to map to a database table.

classes.name: AuditLog
classes.description: JPA entity class for audit log entries, including properties for action, email, source IP, timestamp, and metadata, with appropriate constructors and getters/setters.

methods.name: AuditLog
methods.description: Parameterized constructor to create an AuditLog with specified action, email, sourceIp, and meta fields; timestamp is set to current time.

methods.name: getId
methods.description: Returns the primary key id of the audit log.

methods.name: getAction
methods.description: Returns the action performed (e.g., REGISTER, LOGIN_ATTEMPT).

methods.name: setAction
methods.description: Sets the action for the audit log.

methods.name: getEmail
methods.description: Returns the email associated with the log entry, if any.

methods.name: setEmail
methods.description: Sets the email associated with the log entry.

methods.name: getTimestamp
methods.description: Returns the timestamp of the log entry.

methods.name: setTimestamp
methods.description: Sets the timestamp of the log entry.

methods.name: getMeta
methods.description: Returns additional metadata associated with the log.

methods.name: setMeta
methods.description: Sets additional metadata for the log.
